item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set +e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
output="'$(rg -n -uu '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root" 2>&1)
search_rc=$?
if [ -n "$output" ]; then
  printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$output"
fi
printf '"'stale_strategy_search_exit=%s\\n' \""'$search_rc"
if [ "$search_rc" -eq 1 ]; then
  printf '"'STALE_STRATEGY_REFERENCES=0\\n'
  printf 'REMOVAL_RESULT=NO_CHANGE_REQUIRED\\n'
elif [ \""'$search_rc" -eq 0 ]; then
  printf '"'STALE_STRATEGY_REFERENCES=FOUND\\n'
  printf 'REMOVAL_RESULT=NOT_PERFORMED\\n'
else
  printf 'STALE_STRATEGY_SEARCH=ERROR\\n'
fi
exit 0"
